ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "return_forecast" REAL /* Predicted return on investment */,
  "rol_var_pred" REAL /* Predicted rolling variance */,
  "observe_return" REAL /* Observed market return */,
  "rolling_var" REAL /* Calculated rolling variance */,
  "rol_avg" REAL /* Calculated rolling average return */,
  "ewm" REAL /* Exponentially weighted moving average */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Market index (e.g., S&P 500, Dow Jones) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector (e.g., finance, technology, healthcare) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market in which the instrument is traded */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry (e.g., finance, technology, healthcare) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the return is recorded */,
  "return" REAL /* Observed return for the instrument */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_returns_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_measures" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk measure entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the risk measure is calculated */,
  "rolling_variance" REAL /* Calculated rolling variance */,
  "ewm" REAL /* Exponentially weighted moving average */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility measure (e.g., standard deviation) */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value-at-risk (VaR) measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_measures_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return forecast entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the return is forecasted */,
  "forecasted_return" REAL /* Forecasted return for the instrument */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_forecasts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., historical, forecasted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the note */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the note is about */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., market analysis, trade idea) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who developed the strategy */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the strategy is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was developed */,
  "strategy_details" TEXT /* Details of the investment strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "investment_goals" TEXT /* Investment goals (e.g., growth, income, capital preservation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_strategies_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment strategy */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metric is calculated */,
  "return" REAL /* Calculated return for the strategy */,
  "risk" REAL /* Calculated risk for the strategy */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., return on investment, Sharpe ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the report is about */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market analysis, strategy review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument impacted by the news */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the sentiment is calculated */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Calculated sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternative_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the alternative data */,
  "data_content" TEXT /* Content of the alternative data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternative_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment strategy */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the result is calculated */,
  "return" REAL /* Calculated return for the strategy */,
  "risk" REAL /* Calculated risk for the strategy */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., profit/loss, Sharpe ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the model parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)
